title: Max number of boards per workspace?
excerpt: Is there a max number of boards we can have per workspace?

posts.author: Jaewoo (Jaewoo Kim)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a max number of boards we can have per workspace?

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, it’s ten as far as I know. A bit lame if you ask me

posts.author: Jaewoo (Jaewoo Kim)
posts.cookedHtml: Oh are you sure? I definitely have alot more than that. I was wondering if there was a cap at like 1000.

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml: Sorry, misunderstood. I thought you meant boards added to dashboards, that’s ten. I don’t know if there’s a max amount of boards in a workspace
